BBox.description: Axis-aligned bounding box in PDF user space (origin bottom-left).

ChunkKind.description: What kind of content a chunk holds.

oneOf.description: A monospace code block (line breaks + indentation preserved).
A list item (bullet/ordinal marker or LI tag).

description: A retrieval chunk with a precise source anchor.

bbox.description: Union bounding box of the source content on `page` (PDF user space).

heading_path.description: Enclosing heading breadcrumb, outermost first (section context).

id.description: Stable sequential id within the document.

page.description: Source page (1-based, as in the IR).

section_id.description:
Id of the enclosing [`crate::outline::Section`] (0 = before any heading /
document root). Lets a consumer map a chunk back into the structure tree
for parent-document / auto-merging retrieval.

title: Chunk
